requirement: docs reflect the current command, install, release, and workflow surfaces

ratingResult.rationale: Most docs match current workflows, but install examples still pin an obsolete v0.5.1 release despite the active 0.11.0 CLI/skill pair.

findings.observation: The non-interactive pinned installer example uses QUALITYMD_VERSION=v0.5.1; PowerShell and sh -s examples repeat the stale v0.5.1 pin at nearby lines.
